title: Add Wave 26 manager queue action completion regression matrix
description: Extend QA matrix for queue completion contract, deterministic envelopes, and cross-wave baseline safety while preserving Waves 20-25 manager behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix covers queue action success/conflict/validation and envelope metadata
API tests assert deterministic forbidden/unauthorized envelopes for queue action endpoint
Wave 20-25 baselines remain stable after Wave 26 additions
